case_title: MAKRAS REAL ESTATE vs. INGALLS, THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF FEB-14-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER THE COURT DEEMS THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT TO BE AMENDED ON THEIR FACES TO INCLUDE CLAIMANT AS DEFEND- ENT;THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT, AS THUS AMENDED, MUST BE SERV ED ON THE CLAIMANT. CLAIMANT MUST TIMELY FILE AND SERVE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING WITH THE COURT.
